name: nature-polishing
description: Nature-style academic writing polishing skill that polishes, restructures, or translates scientific prose using structured writing principles and curated Nature article patterns.

interface.shortDescription: Polish academic prose in the style of Nature and Nature Communications
interface.longDescription: Use this skill to polish, restructure, or translate scientific writing into concise Nature-leaning English. It uses structured writing strategies, curated Nature/Nature Communications article patterns, and a phrasebank to improve clarity and adherence to journal conventions. It also includes tools for LaTeX float layout fixes.
defaultPrompt: Polish this abstract in Nature style.
Improve the clarity of this introduction.
Fix the LaTeX layout for this figure page.
